# Review for human, brand-aligned prose

Read `brief.md`, `intent.md`, `draft.md`, and `verification.md`. Return
`humanization.md`; do not rewrite the article.

Identify exact passages with templated openings, empty transitions, vague
authority, synthetic quotations, repetitive sentence rhythm, keyword stuffing,
over-signposting, generic conclusions, or a voice that conflicts with the
brief. For each finding prescribe a concrete repair and explain the reader
benefit. Also name strong passages that should survive revision.

Conclude with `humanization_gate: pass|changes-required`. File existence is not
a pass: measurable findings must be addressed in the final article. End with
`<!-- COMPLETE -->`.
